name: engineering-learning-hub
description: Self-paced engineering learning hub — AI Agents, REST, and backend-systems tracks (visual HTML lessons + EPUBs + an in-browser EPUB reader).
//: The in-browser EPUB reader (reader.html) loads .epub files with fetch/XHR.
Chromium browsers (Brave, Chrome, Edge) block fetch() of file:// resources for
security, so opening reader.html?book=… straight from disk fails. Serving the
folder over http:// (same-origin) makes those requests legal in every browser.
npm start              -> serves this folder, then open http://localhost:8000/
NO INSTALL NEEDED: server.js uses only Node's built-in modules (zero deps).
Nothing is downloaded from any registry; `npm install` is optional/no-op.
Fallbacks below cover machines without Node.
